description: Context for GKG query-path events (gkg_query_executed, gkg_schema_introspected).

source_type.description: Source type of the request, matching the value emitted in the GKG JWT source_type claim by Rails.

tool_name.description: Name of the Orbit tool invoked (e.g. query_graph, get_graph_schema). Left as a free-form string so new tools can be added without a schema bump.

coding_agent.description: Identifier of the coding agent that initiated the request. Null when the caller is not a coding agent.

queried_namespace_ids.description: List of namespace IDs associated with the query. The unit of adoption for WAN metric.

items.description: Namespace ID associated with the query

root_namespace_id.description: Top-level group of the caller's namespace. Required for billing rollup and enterprise segmentation.

global_user_id.description: Globally unique identity of the calling user. Null for bot or service account calls.

user_type.description: Distinguishes human users from automated callers.

plan.description: Name of the plan, such as free, premium or ultimate.

session_id.description: Correlates multiple Orbit tool calls within a single DAP session. Null for non-DAP access.

is_gitlab_team_member.description: Separates internal dogfooding from real external adoption. Null if not determinable.
